<!--
PR title: use a Conventional Commit (e.g. "feat(adapters): add Windsurf adapter",
"fix(runtime): resume interrupted downloads"). This drives the release version.
-->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and why? Link any issue: Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `fix` — bug fix (patch)
- [ ] `feat` — new feature (minor)
- [ ] breaking change (`feat!` / `BREAKING CHANGE:`) — (major)
- [ ] docs / chore / refactor / test / ci — no release

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests where it makes sense
- [ ] For a new adapter: registered it and documented it per CONTRIBUTING.md
